# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Currently, only the latest `main` branch is actively supported with security updates.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| `main`  | :white_check_mark: |
| Older   | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take the security of our platform and user data very seriously.

If you believe you've found a security vulnerability in this repository, please **DO NOT** disclose it publicly (e.g. by creating a GitHub Issue). Instead, please report it privately:

1. Send an email to the repository owner directly.
2. Provide a detailed summary of the vulnerability, including step-by-step instructions to reproduce it.

You will receive an initial response within 48 hours. If the vulnerability is confirmed, we will work with you to patch it securely before disclosing the issue. Thank you for keeping our community safe!
